div.div:
Command formats:
U-type: opcode(7 bits) | rd (5 bits) | imm(20 bits)
J-type: opcode(7 bits) | rs1 (5 bits) | rs2 or rd (5 bits) | imm(15 bits)
S-type: opcode(7 bits) | rs1 (5 bits) | rs2 (5 bits) | imm(15 bits)
I-type: opcode(7 bits) | rs1 (5 bits) | rd (5 bits) | imm(15 bits)
R-type: opcode(7 bits) | rs1 (5 bits) | rs2 (5 bits) | rd (5 bits) | func (10 bits)
